 678 | 
 679 |     def _set_vocab_gpt2(self) -> None:
 680 |         tokens, toktypes, tokpre = self.get_vocab_base()
 681 |         self.gguf_writer.add_tokenizer_model("gpt2")
 682 |         self.gguf_writer.add_tokenizer_pre(tokpre)
 683 |         self.gguf_writer.add_token_list(tokens)
 684 |         self.gguf_writer.add_token_types(toktypes)
 685 | 
 686 |         special_vocab = gguf.SpecialVocab(self.dir_model, load_merges=True)
 687 |         special_vocab.add_to_gguf(self.gguf_writer)
 688 | 
 689 |     def _set_vocab_qwen(self):
 690 |         dir_model = self.dir_model
 691 |         hparams = self.hparams
 692 |         tokens: list[str] = []
 693 |         toktypes: list[int] = []
 694 | 
 695 |         from transformers import AutoTokenizer
 696 |         tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(dir_model, trust_remote_code=True)
 697 |         vocab_size = hparams["vocab_size"]
 698 |         assert max(tokenizer.get_vocab().values()) < vocab_size
 699 | 
 700 |         tokpre = self.get_vocab_base_pre(tokenizer)
 701 | 
 702 |         merges = []
 703 |         vocab = {}
 704 |         mergeable_ranks = tokenizer.mergeable_ranks
 705 |         for token, rank in mergeable_ranks.items():
 706 |             vocab[QwenModel.token_bytes_to_string(token)] = rank
 707 |             if len(token) == 1:
 708 |                 continue
 709 |             merged = QwenModel.bpe(mergeable_ranks, token, max_rank=rank)
 710 |             assert len(merged) == 2
 711 |             merges.append(' '.join(map(QwenModel.token_bytes_to_string, merged)))
 712 | 
 713 |         # for this kind of tokenizer, added_vocab is not a subset of vocab, so they need to be combined
 714 |         added_vocab = tokenizer.special_tokens
 715 |         reverse_vocab = {id_ : encoded_tok for encoded_tok, id_ in {**vocab, **added_vocab}.items()}
 716 | 
 717 |         for i in range(vocab_size):
 718 |             if i not in reverse_vocab:
 719 |                 tokens.append(f"[PAD{i}]")
 720 |                 toktypes.append(gguf.TokenType.UNUSED)
 721 |             elif reverse_vocab[i] in added_vocab:
 722 |                 tokens.append(reverse_vocab[i])
 723 |                 toktypes.append(gguf.TokenType.CONTROL)
 724 |             else:
 725 |                 tokens.append(reverse_vocab[i])
 726 |                 toktypes.append(gguf.TokenType.NORMAL)
 727 | 
 728 |         self.gguf_writer.add_tokenizer_model("gpt2")
 729 |         self.gguf_writer.add_tokenizer_pre(tokpre)
 730 |         self.gguf_writer.add_token_list(tokens)
 731 |         self.gguf_writer.add_token_types(toktypes)
 732 | 
 733 |         special_vocab = gguf.SpecialVocab(dir_model, load_merges=False)
 734 |         special_vocab.merges = merges
 735 |         # only add special tokens when they were not already loaded from config.json
 736 |         if len(special_vocab.special_token_ids) == 0:
 737 |             special_vocab._set_special_token("bos", tokenizer.special_tokens["<|endoftext|>"])
 738 |             special_vocab._set_special_token("eos", tokenizer.special_tokens["<|endoftext|>"])
 739 |         # this one is usually not in config.json anyway
 740 |         special_vocab._set_special_token("unk", tokenizer.special_tokens["<|endoftext|>"])
 741 |         special_vocab.add_to_gguf(self.gguf_writer)
 742 | 
 743 |     def _set_vocab_sentencepiece(self, add_to_gguf=True):
 744 |         tokens, scores, toktypes = self._create_vocab_sentencepiece()
 745 | 
 746 |         self.gguf_writer.add_tokenizer_model("llama")
 747 |         self.gguf_writer.add_tokenizer_pre("default")
 748 |         self.gguf_writer.add_token_list(tokens)
 749 |         self.gguf_writer.add_token_scores(scores)
 750 |         self.gguf_writer.add_token_types(toktypes)
 751 | 
 752 |         special_vocab = gguf.SpecialVocab(self.dir_model, n_vocab=len(tokens))
 753 |         special_vocab.add_to_gguf(self.gguf_writer)
 754 | 
 755 |     def _create_vocab_sentencepiece(self):
 756 |         from sentencepiece import SentencePieceProcessor
 757 | 
 758 |         tokenizer_path = self.dir_model / 'tokenizer.model'
 759 | 
 760 |         if not tokenizer_path.is_file():
 761 |             raise FileNotFoundError(f"File not found: {tokenizer_path}")
 762 | 
 763 |         tokenizer = SentencePieceProcessor()
 764 |         tokenizer.LoadFromFile(str(tokenizer_path))
 765 | 
 766 |         vocab_size = self.hparams.get('vocab_size', tokenizer.vocab_size())
 767 | 
 768 |         tokens: list[bytes] = [f"[PAD{i}]".encode("utf-8") for i in range(vocab_size)]
 769 |         scores: list[float] = [-10000.0] * vocab_size
 770 |         toktypes: list[int] = [SentencePieceTokenTypes.UNUSED] * vocab_size
 771 | 
 772 |         for token_id in range(tokenizer.vocab_size()):
 773 |             piece = tokenizer.IdToPiece(token_id)
 774 |             text = piece.encode("utf-8")
 775 |             score = tokenizer.GetScore(token_id)
 776 | 
 777 |             toktype = SentencePieceTokenTypes.NORMAL
 778 |             if tokenizer.IsUnknown(token_id):
 779 |                 toktype = SentencePieceTokenTypes.UNKNOWN
 780 |             elif tokenizer.IsControl(token_id):
 781 |                 toktype = SentencePieceTokenTypes.CONTROL
 782 |             elif tokenizer.IsUnused(token_id):
 783 |                 toktype = SentencePieceTokenTypes.UNUSED
 784 |             elif tokenizer.IsByte(token_id):
 785 |                 toktype = SentencePieceTokenTypes.BYTE
 786 | 
 787 |             tokens[token_id] = text
 788 |             scores[token_id] = score
 789 |             toktypes[token_id] = toktype
 790 | 
 791 |         added_tokens_file = self.dir_model / 'added_tokens.json'
 792 |         if added_tokens_file.is_file():
 793 |             with open(added_tokens_file, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
 794 |                 added_tokens_json = json.load(f)
 795 |                 for key in added_tokens_json:
 796 |                     token_id = added_tokens_json[key]
 797 |                     if token_id >= vocab_size:
 798 |                         logger.warning(f'ignore token {token_id}: id is out of range, max={vocab_size - 1}')
 799 |                         continue
 800 | 
 801 |                     tokens[token_id] = key.encode("utf-8")
 802 |                     scores[token_id] = -1000.0
 803 |                     toktypes[token_id] = SentencePieceTokenTypes.USER_DEFINED
 804 | 
 805 |         tokenizer_config_file = self.dir_model / 'tokenizer_config.json'
 806 |         if tokenizer_config_file.is_file():
 807 |             with open(tokenizer_config_file, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
 808 |                 tokenizer_config_json = json.load(f)
 809 |                 added_tokens_decoder = tokenizer_config_json.get("added_tokens_decoder", {})
 810 |                 for token_id, token_data in added_tokens_decoder.items():
 811 |                     token_id = int(token_id)
 812 |                     token: str = token_data["content"]
 813 |                     if toktypes[token_id] != SentencePieceTokenTypes.UNUSED:
 814 |                         if tokens[token_id] != token.encode("utf-8"):
 815 |                             logger.warning(f'replacing token {token_id}: {tokens[token_id].decode("utf-8")!r} -> {token!r}')
 816 |                     if token_data.get("special") or self.does_token_look_special(token):
 817 |                         toktypes[token_id] = SentencePieceTokenTypes.CONTROL
 818 |                     else:
 819 |                         token = token.replace(b"\xe2\x96\x81".decode("utf-8"), " ")  # pre-normalize user-defined spaces
 820 |                         toktypes[token_id] = SentencePieceTokenTypes.USER_DEFINED
 821 | 
 822 |                     scores[token_id] = -1000.0
 823 |                     tokens[token_id] = token.encode("utf-8")
 824 | 
 825 |         if vocab_size > len(tokens):
 826 |             pad_count = vocab_size - len(tokens)
 827 |             logger.debug(f"Padding vocab with {pad_count} token(s) - [PAD1] through [PAD{pad_count}]")
 828 |             for i in range(1, pad_count + 1):
 829 |                 tokens.append(bytes(f"[PAD{i}]", encoding="utf-8"))
 830 |                 scores.append(-1000.0)
 831 |                 toktypes.append(SentencePieceTokenTypes.UNUSED)
 832 | 
 833 |         return tokens, scores, toktypes
 834 | 
 835 |     def _set_vocab_llama_hf(self):
 836 |         vocab = gguf.LlamaHfVocab(self.dir_model)
 837 |         tokens = []
 838 |         scores = []
 839 |         toktypes = []
 840 | 
 841 |         for text, score, toktype in vocab.all_tokens():
 842 |             tokens.append(text)
 843 |             scores.append(score)
 844 |             toktypes.append(toktype)
 845 | 
 846 |         assert len(tokens) == vocab.vocab_size
 847 | 
 848 |         self.gguf_writer.add_tokenizer_model("llama")
 849 |         self.gguf_writer.add_tokenizer_pre("default")
 850 |         self.gguf_writer.add_token_list(tokens)
 851 |         self.gguf_writer.add_token_scores(scores)
 852 |         self.gguf_writer.add_token_types(toktypes)
 853 | 
 854 |         special_vocab = gguf.SpecialVocab(self.dir_model, n_vocab=len(tokens))
 855 |         special_vocab.add_to_gguf(self.gguf_writer)
 856 | 
 857 |     def _set_vocab_builtin(self, model_name: Literal["gpt-neox", "llama-spm"], vocab_size: int):
 858 |         tokenizer_path = Path(sys.path[0]) / "models" / f"ggml-vocab-{model_name}.gguf"
 859 |         logger.warning(f"Using tokenizer from '{os.path.relpath(tokenizer_path, os.getcwd())}'")
 860 |         vocab_reader = gguf.GGUFReader(tokenizer_path, "r")
 861 | 
 862 |         default_pre = "mpt" if model_name == "gpt-neox" else "default"
 863 | 
 864 |         field = vocab_reader.get_field(gguf.Keys.Tokenizer.MODEL)
 865 |         assert field  # tokenizer model
 866 |         self.gguf_writer.add_tokenizer_model(bytes(field.parts[-1]).decode("utf-8"))
 867 | 
 868 |         field = vocab_reader.get_field(gguf.Keys.Tokenizer.PRE)
 869 |         self.gguf_writer.add_tokenizer_pre(bytes(field.parts[-1]).decode("utf-8") if field else default_pre)
 870 | 
 871 |         field = vocab_reader.get_field(gguf.Keys.Tokenizer.LIST)
 872 |         assert field  # token list
 873 |         self.gguf_writer.add_token_list([bytes(field.parts[i]) for i in field.data][:vocab_size])
 874 | 
 875 |         if model_name == "llama-spm":
 876 |             field = vocab_reader.get_field(gguf.Keys.Tokenizer.SCORES)
 877 |             assert field  # token scores
 878 |             self.gguf_writer.add_token_scores([field.parts[i].tolist()[0] for i in field.data][:vocab_size])
 879 | 
 880 |         field = vocab_reader.get_field(gguf.Keys.Tokenizer.TOKEN_TYPE)
 881 |         assert field  # token types
 882 |         self.gguf_writer.add_token_types([field.parts[i].tolist()[0] for i in field.data][:vocab_size])
 883 | 
 884 |         if model_name != "llama-spm":
 885 |             field = vocab_reader.get_field(gguf.Keys.Tokenizer.MERGES)
 886 |             assert field  # token merges
 887 |             self.gguf_writer.add_token_merges([bytes(field.parts[i]) for i in field.data])
 888 | 
 889 |         if (field := vocab_reader.get_field(gguf.Keys.Tokenizer.BOS_ID)) is not None:
 890 |             self.gguf_writer.add_bos_token_id(field.parts[-1].tolist()[0])
 891 |         if (field := vocab_reader.get_field(gguf.Keys.Tokenizer.EOS_ID)) is not None:
 892 |             self.gguf_writer.add_eos_token_id(field.parts[-1].tolist()[0])
 893 |         if (field := vocab_reader.get_field(gguf.Keys.Tokenizer.UNK_ID)) is not None:
 894 |             self.gguf_writer.add_unk_token_id(field.parts[-1].tolist()[0])
 895 |         if (field := vocab_reader.get_field(gguf.Keys.Tokenizer.PAD_ID)) is not None:
 896 |             self.gguf_writer.add_pad_token_id(field.parts[-1].tolist()[0])
 897 |         if (field := vocab_reader.get_field(gguf.Keys.Tokenizer.ADD_BOS)) is not None:
 898 |             self.gguf_writer.add_add_bos_token(field.parts[-1].tolist()[0])
 899 |         if (field := vocab_reader.get_field(gguf.Keys.Tokenizer.ADD_EOS)) is not None:
 900 |             self.gguf_writer.add_add_eos_token(field.parts[-1].tolist()[0])
 901 | 
 902 | 
 903 | @Model.register("GPTNeoXForCausalLM")
 904 | class GPTNeoXModel(Model):
 905 |     model_arch = gguf.MODEL_ARCH.GPTNEOX
 906 | 
 907 |     def set_gguf_parameters(self):
 908 |         block_count = self.hparams["num_hidden_layers"]
 909 | 
 910 |         self.gguf_writer.add_context_length(self.hparams["max_position_embeddings"])
 911 |         self.gguf_writer.add_embedding_length(self.hparams["hidden_size"])
 912 |         self.gguf_writer.add_block_count(block_count)
 913 |         self.gguf_writer.add_feed_forward_length(self.hparams["intermediate_size"])
 914 |         self.gguf_writer.add_rope_dimension_count(
 915 |             int(self.hparams["rotary_pct"] * (self.hparams["hidden_size"] // self.hparams["num_attention_heads"])),
 916 |         )
 917 |         self.gguf_writer.add_head_count(self.hparams["num_attention_heads"])
 918 |         self.gguf_writer.add_parallel_residual(self.hparams.get("use_parallel_residual", True))
 919 |         self.gguf_writer.add_layer_norm_eps(self.hparams["layer_norm_eps"])
 920 | 
 921 |     def modify_tensors(self, data_torch: Tensor, name: str, bid: int | None) -> Iterable[tuple[str, Tensor]]:
 922 |         del bid  # unused
 923 | 
 924 |         n_head = self.hparams.get("n_head", self.hparams.get("num_attention_heads"))
 925 |         n_embed = self.hparams.get("hidden_size", self.hparams.get("n_embed"))
 926 | 
 927 |         tensors: list[tuple[str, Tensor]] = []
 928 | 
 929 |         if re.match(r"gpt_neox\.layers\.\d+\.attention\.query_key_value\.weight", name):
 930 |             # Map bloom-style qkv_linear to gpt-style qkv_linear
 931 |             # bloom: https://github.com/huggingface/transformers/blob/main/src/transformers/models/bloom/modeling_bloom.py#L238-L252  # noqa
 932 |             # gpt-2: https://github.com/huggingface/transformers/blob/main/src/transformers/models/gpt2/modeling_gpt2.py#L312  # noqa
 933 |             qkv_weights = data_torch.reshape((n_head, 3, n_embed // n_head, n_embed))
 934 |             data_torch = torch.cat(
 935 |                 (
 936 |                     qkv_weights[:, 0, :, :].reshape((-1, n_embed)),
 937 |                     qkv_weights[:, 1, :, :].reshape((-1, n_embed)),
 938 |                     qkv_weights[:, 2, :, :].reshape((-1, n_embed)),
 939 |                 ),
 940 |                 dim=0,
 941 |             )
 942 |             logger.info("re-format attention.linear_qkv.weight")
 943 |         elif re.match(r"gpt_neox\.layers\.\d+\.attention\.query_key_value\.bias", name):
 944 |             qkv_bias = data_torch.reshape((n_head, 3, n_embed // n_head))
 945 |             data_torch = torch.cat(
 946 |                 (
 947 |                     qkv_bias[:, 0, :].reshape((n_embed,)),
 948 |                     qkv_bias[:, 1, :].reshape((n_embed,)),
 949 |                     qkv_bias[:, 2, :].reshape((n_embed,)),
 950 |                 ),
 951 |                 dim=0,
 952 |             )
 953 |             logger.info("re-format attention.linear_qkv.bias")
 954 | 
 955 |         tensors.append((self.map_tensor_name(name), data_torch))
 956 | 
 957 |         return tensors
 958 | 
 959 | 
 960 | @Model.register("BloomForCausalLM", "BloomModel")
 961 | class BloomModel(Model):
 962 |     model_arch = gguf.MODEL_ARCH.BLOOM
 963 | 
 964 |     def set_gguf_parameters(self):
 965 |         n_embed = self.hparams.get("hidden_size", self.hparams.get("n_embed"))
 966 |         n_head = self.hparams.get("n_head", self.hparams.get("num_attention_heads"))
 967 |         self.gguf_writer.add_context_length(self.hparams.get("seq_length", n_embed))
 968 |         self.gguf_writer.add_embedding_length(n_embed)
 969 |         self.gguf_writer.add_feed_forward_length(4 * n_embed)
 970 |         self.gguf_writer.add_block_count(self.hparams["n_layer"])
 971 |         self.gguf_writer.add_head_count(n_head)
 972 |         self.gguf_writer.add_head_count_kv(n_head)
 973 |         self.gguf_writer.add_layer_norm_eps(self.hparams["layer_norm_epsilon"])
 974 |         self.gguf_writer.add_file_type(self.ftype)
 975 | 
 976 |     def modify_tensors(self, data_torch: Tensor, name: str, bid: int | None) -> Iterable[tuple[str, Tensor]]:
 977 |         del bid  # unused
 978 | 
 979 |         n_head = self.hparams.get("n_head", self.hparams.get("num_attention_heads"))
 980 |         n_embed = self.hparams.get("hidden_size", self.hparams.get("n_embed"))
 981 | 
 982 |         name = re.sub(r'transformer\.', '', name)
 983 | 
 984 |         tensors: list[tuple[str, Tensor]] = []
 985 | 
 986 |         if re.match(r"h\.\d+\.self_attention\.query_key_value\.weight", name):
 987 |             # Map bloom-style qkv_linear to gpt-style qkv_linear
 988 |             # bloom: https://github.com/huggingface/transformers/blob/main/src/transformers/models/bloom/modeling_bloom.py#L238-L252  # noqa
 989 |             # gpt-2: https://github.com/huggingface/transformers/blob/main/src/transformers/models/gpt2/modeling_gpt2.py#L312  # noqa
 990 |             qkv_weights = data_torch.reshape((n_head, 3, n_embed // n_head, n_embed))
 991 |             data_torch = torch.cat(
 992 |                 (
 993 |                     qkv_weights[:, 0, :, :].reshape((-1, n_embed)),
 994 |                     qkv_weights[:, 1, :, :].reshape((-1, n_embed)),
 995 |                     qkv_weights[:, 2, :, :].reshape((-1, n_embed)),
 996 |                 ),
 997 |                 dim=0,
 998 |             )
 999 |             logger.info("re-format attention.linear_qkv.weight")
1000 |         elif re.match(r"h\.\d+\.self_attention\.query_key_value\.bias", name):
1001 |             qkv_bias = data_torch.reshape((n_head, 3, n_embed // n_head))
1002 |             data_torch = torch.cat(
1003 |                 (
1004 |                     qkv_bias[:, 0, :].reshape((n_embed,)),
1005 |                     qkv_bias[:, 1, :].reshape((n_embed,)),
1006 |                     qkv_bias[:, 2, :].reshape((n_embed,)),
1007 |                 ),
1008 |                 dim=0,
1009 |             )
1010 |             logger.info("re-format attention.linear_qkv.bias")
1011 | 
1012 |         tensors.append((self.map_tensor_name(name), data_torch))
1013 | 
1014 |         if name == "word_embeddings.weight":
1015 |             assert self.tensor_names is not None
1016 | 
1017 |             # TODO: tie them at runtime, don't duplicate in the model file
1018 |             if all(s not in self.tensor_names for s in ("lm_head.weight", "output.weight")):
1019 |                 tensors.append((self.format_tensor_name(gguf.MODEL_TENSOR.OUTPUT), data_torch))
1020 | 
1021 |         return tensors
1022 | 
1023 | 
1024 | @Model.register("MPTForCausalLM")
1025 | class MPTModel(Model):
1026 |     model_arch = gguf.MODEL_ARCH.MPT
1027 | 
1028 |     def set_vocab(self):
1029 |         try:
1030 |             self._set_vocab_gpt2()
1031 |         except Exception:
1032 |             # Fallback for SEA-LION model
1033 |             self._set_vocab_sentencepiece()
1034 |             self.gguf_writer.add_add_bos_token(False)
1035 |             self.gguf_writer.add_pad_token_id(3)
1036 |             self.gguf_writer.add_eos_token_id(1)
1037 |             self.gguf_writer.add_unk_token_id(0)
1038 | 
1039 |     def set_gguf_parameters(self):
1040 |         block_count = self.hparams["n_layers"]
1041 |         self.gguf_writer.add_context_length(self.hparams["max_seq_len"])
1042 |         self.gguf_writer.add_embedding_length(self.hparams["d_model"])
1043 |         self.gguf_writer.add_block_count(block_count)
1044 |         self.gguf_writer.add_feed_forward_length(4 * self.hparams["d_model"])
1045 |         self.gguf_writer.add_head_count(self.hparams["n_heads"])
1046 |         if kv_n_heads := self.hparams["attn_config"].get("kv_n_heads"):
1047 |             self.gguf_writer.add_head_count_kv(kv_n_heads)
1048 |         self.gguf_writer.add_layer_norm_eps(1e-5)
1049 |         if self.hparams["attn_config"]["clip_qkv"] is not None:
1050 |             self.gguf_writer.add_clamp_kqv(self.hparams["attn_config"]["clip_qkv"])
1051 |         if self.hparams["attn_config"]["alibi"]:
1052 |             self.gguf_writer.add_max_alibi_bias(self.hparams["attn_config"]["alibi_bias_max"])
1053 |         else:
1054 |             self.gguf_writer.add_max_alibi_bias(0.0)
1055 | 
1056 |     def modify_tensors(self, data_torch: Tensor, name: str, bid: int | None) -> Iterable[tuple[str, Tensor]]:
1057 |         del bid  # unused
1058 | 
1059 |         if "scales" in name:
1060 |             new_name = self.map_tensor_name(name, try_suffixes=(".weight", ".bias", ".scales"))
1061 |             new_name = new_name.replace("scales", "act.scales")
1062 |         else:
1063 |             new_name = self.map_tensor_name(name, try_suffixes=(".weight", ".bias"))
1064 | 
1065 |         return [(new_name, data_torch)]
1066 | 
1067 | 
1068 | @Model.register("OrionForCausalLM")
1069 | class OrionModel(Model):
1070 |     model_arch = gguf.MODEL_ARCH.ORION
1071 | 
1072 |     def set_vocab(self):
1073 |         self._set_vocab_sentencepiece()
1074 | 
1075 |     def set_gguf_parameters(self):
1076 |         block_count = self.hparams["num_hidden_layers"]
1077 |         head_count = self.hparams["num_attention_heads"]
1078 |         head_count_kv = self.hparams.get("num_key_value_heads", head_count)
1079 | 
1080 |         ctx_length = 0
1081 |         if "max_sequence_length" in self.hparams:
1082 |             ctx_length = self.hparams["max_sequence_length"]
1083 |         elif "max_position_embeddings" in self.hparams:
1084 |             ctx_length = self.hparams["max_position_embeddings"]
1085 |         elif "model_max_length" in self.hparams:
1086 |             ctx_length = self.hparams["model_max_length"]
1087 |         else:
1088 |             raise ValueError("gguf: can not find ctx length parameter.")
1089 | 
1090 |         self.gguf_writer.add_file_type(self.ftype)
1091 |         self.gguf_writer.add_tensor_data_layout("Meta AI original pth")
1092 |         self.gguf_writer.add_context_length(ctx_length)
1093 |         self.gguf_writer.add_embedding_length(self.hparams["hidden_size"])
1094 |         self.gguf_writer.add_block_count(block_count)
1095 |         self.gguf_writer.add_feed_forward_length(self.hparams["intermediate_size"])
1096 |         self.gguf_writer.add_head_count(head_count)
1097 |         self.gguf_writer.add_head_count_kv(head_count_kv)
1098 |         # note: config provides rms norm but it is actually layer norm
1099 |         # ref:  https://huggingface.co/OrionStarAI/Orion-14B-Chat/blob/276a17221ce42beb45f66fac657a41540e71f4f5/modeling_orion.py#L570-L571
1100 |         self.gguf_writer.add_layer_norm_eps(self.hparams["rms_norm_eps"])
1101 | 
1102 | 
1103 | @Model.register("BaichuanForCausalLM", "BaiChuanForCausalLM")
1104 | class BaichuanModel(Model):
1105 |     model_arch = gguf.MODEL_ARCH.BAICHUAN
1106 | 
1107 |     def set_vocab(self):
1108 |         self._set_vocab_sentencepiece()
1109 | 
1110 |     def set_gguf_parameters(self):
1111 |         block_count = self.hparams["num_hidden_layers"]
1112 |         head_count = self.hparams["num_attention_heads"]
1113 |         head_count_kv = self.hparams.get("num_key_value_heads", head_count)
1114 | 
1115 |         ctx_length = 0
1116 |         if "max_sequence_length" in self.hparams:
1117 |             ctx_length = self.hparams["max_sequence_length"]
1118 |         elif "max_position_embeddings" in self.hparams:
1119 |             ctx_length = self.hparams["max_position_embeddings"]
1120 |         elif "model_max_length" in self.hparams:
1121 |             ctx_length = self.hparams["model_max_length"]
1122 |         else:
1123 |             raise ValueError("gguf: can not find ctx length parameter.")
1124 | 
1125 |         self.gguf_writer.add_tensor_data_layout("Meta AI original pth")
1126 |         self.gguf_writer.add_context_length(ctx_length)
1127 |         self.gguf_writer.add_embedding_length(self.hparams["hidden_size"])
1128 |         self.gguf_writer.add_block_count(block_count)
1129 |         self.gguf_writer.add_feed_forward_length(self.hparams["intermediate_size"])
1130 |         self.gguf_writer.add_rope_dimension_count(self.hparams["hidden_size"] // self.hparams["num_attention_heads"])
1131 |         self.gguf_writer.add_head_count(head_count)
1132 |         self.gguf_writer.add_head_count_kv(head_count_kv)
1133 |         self.gguf_writer.add_layer_norm_rms_eps(self.hparams["rms_norm_eps"])
1134 |         self.gguf_writer.add_file_type(self.ftype)
1135 | 
1136 |         if self.hparams.get("rope_scaling") is not None and "factor" in self.hparams["rope_scaling"]:
1137 |             if self.hparams["rope_scaling"].get("type") == "linear":
1138 |                 self.gguf_writer.add_rope_scaling_type(gguf.RopeScalingType.LINEAR)
1139 |                 self.gguf_writer.add_rope_scaling_factor(self.hparams["rope_scaling"]["factor"])
1140 | 
1141 |     def modify_tensors(self, data_torch: Tensor, name: str, bid: int | None) -> Iterable[tuple[str, Tensor]]:
1142 |         head_count = self.hparams["num_attention_heads"]
1143 |         head_count_kv = self.hparams.get("num_key_value_heads", head_count)
1144 | 
1145 |         tensors: list[tuple[str, Tensor]] = []
1146 | 
1147 |         if bid is not None and name == f"model.layers.{bid}.self_attn.W_pack.weight":
1148 |             logger.info(f"Unpacking and permuting layer {bid}")
1149 |             tensors = [
1150 |                 (self.format_tensor_name(gguf.MODEL_TENSOR.ATTN_Q, bid),
1151 |                     self._reverse_hf_permute_part(data_torch, 0, head_count, head_count)),
1152 |                 (self.format_tensor_name(gguf.MODEL_TENSOR.ATTN_K, bid),
1153 |                     self._reverse_hf_permute_part(data_torch, 1, head_count, head_count_kv)),
1154 |                 (self.format_tensor_name(gguf.MODEL_TENSOR.ATTN_V, bid),
1155 |                     self._reverse_hf_part(data_torch, 2)),
1156 |             ]
1157 |         else:
1158 |             tensors = [(self.map_tensor_name(name), data_torch)]
1159 | 
1160 |         return tensors
1161 | 
1162 |     def _reverse_hf_permute(self, weights: Tensor, n_head: int, n_kv_head: int | None = None) -> Tensor:
1163 |         if n_kv_head is not None and n_head != n_kv_head:
1164 |             n_head //= n_kv_head
1165 | 
1166 |         return (
1167 |             weights.reshape(n_head, 2, weights.shape[0] // n_head // 2, *weights.shape[1:])
1168 |             .swapaxes(1, 2)
1169 |             .reshape(weights.shape)
1170 |         )
1171 | 
1172 |     def _reverse_hf_permute_part(
1173 |         self, weights: Tensor, n_part: int, n_head: int, n_head_kv: int | None = None,
1174 |     ) -> Tensor:
1175 |         r = weights.shape[0] // 3
1176 |         return self._reverse_hf_permute(weights[r * n_part:r * n_part + r, ...], n_head, n_head_kv)
1177 | 
1178 |     def _reverse_hf_part(self, weights: Tensor, n_part: int) -> Tensor:
1179 |         r = weights.shape[0] // 3
1180 |         return weights[r * n_part:r * n_part + r, ...]
1181 | 
1182 | 
1183 | @Model.register("XverseForCausalLM")
1184 | class XverseModel(Model):
1185 |     model_arch = gguf.MODEL_ARCH.XVERSE
1186 | 
1187 |     def set_vocab(self):
1188 |         assert (self.dir_model / "tokenizer.json").is_file()
1189 |         dir_model = self.dir_model
1190 |         hparams = self.hparams
1191 | 
1192 |         tokens: list[bytes] = []
1193 |         toktypes: list[int] = []
1194 | 
1195 |         from transformers import AutoTokenizer
1196 |         tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(dir_model)
1197 |         vocab_size = hparams.get("vocab_size", len(tokenizer.vocab))
1198 |         # Since we are checking the maximum index, we need to ensure it's strictly less than vocab_size,
1199 |         # because vocab_size is the count of items, and indexes start at 0.
1200 |         max_vocab_index = max(tokenizer.get_vocab().values())
1201 |         if max_vocab_index >= vocab_size:
1202 |             raise ValueError("Vocabulary size exceeds expected maximum size.")
1203 | 
1204 |         reverse_vocab: dict[int, str] = {id_: encoded_tok for encoded_tok, id_ in tokenizer.vocab.items()}
1205 |         added_vocab = tokenizer.get_added_vocab()
1206 | 
1207 |         for token_id in range(vocab_size):
1208 |             token_text = reverse_vocab[token_id].encode('utf-8')
1209 |             # replace "\x00" to string with length > 0
1210 |             if token_text == b"\x00":
1211 |                 toktype = gguf.TokenType.BYTE  # special
1212 |                 token_text = f"<{token_text}>".encode('utf-8')
1213 |             elif re.fullmatch(br"<0x[0-9A-Fa-f]{2}>", token_text):
1214 |                 toktype = gguf.TokenType.BYTE  # special
1215 |             elif reverse_vocab[token_id] in added_vocab:
1216 |                 if tokenizer.added_tokens_decoder[token_id].special:
1217 |                     toktype = gguf.TokenType.CONTROL
1218 |                 else:
1219 |                     toktype = gguf.TokenType.USER_DEFINED
1220 |             else:
1221 |                 toktype = gguf.TokenType.NORMAL
1222 | 
1223 |             tokens.append(token_text)
1224 |             toktypes.append(toktype)
1225 | 
1226 |         self.gguf_writer.add_tokenizer_model("llama")
1227 |         self.gguf_writer.add_tokenizer_pre("default")
1228 |         self.gguf_writer.add_token_list(tokens)
1229 |         self.gguf_writer.add_token_types(toktypes)
1230 | 
1231 |         special_vocab = gguf.SpecialVocab(dir_model, n_vocab=len(tokens))
1232 |         special_vocab.add_to_gguf(self.gguf_writer)
1233 | 
1234 |     def set_gguf_parameters(self):
1235 |         block_count = self.hparams["num_hidden_layers"]
1236 |         head_count = self.hparams["num_attention_heads"]
1237 |         head_count_kv = self.hparams.get("num_key_value_heads", head_count)
1238 | 
1239 |         ctx_length = 0
1240 |         if "max_sequence_length" in self.hparams:
1241 |             ctx_length = self.hparams["max_sequence_length"]
1242 |         elif "max_position_embeddings" in self.hparams:
1243 |             ctx_length = self.hparams["max_position_embeddings"]
1244 |         elif "model_max_length" in self.hparams:
1245 |             ctx_length = self.hparams["model_max_length"]
1246 |         else:
1247 |             raise ValueError("gguf: can not find ctx length parameter.")
1248 | 
1249 |         self.gguf_writer.add_tensor_data_layout("Meta AI original pth")
1250 |         self.gguf_writer.add_context_length(ctx_length)
1251 |         self.gguf_writer.add_embedding_length(self.hparams["hidden_size"])
1252 |         self.gguf_writer.add_block_count(block_count)
1253 |         self.gguf_writer.add_feed_forward_length(self.hparams["intermediate_size"])
1254 |         self.gguf_writer.add_rope_dimension_count(self.hparams["hidden_size"] // self.hparams["num_attention_heads"])
1255 |         self.gguf_writer.add_head_count(head_count)
1256 |         self.gguf_writer.add_head_count_kv(head_count_kv)
1257 |         self.gguf_writer.add_layer_norm_rms_eps(self.hparams["rms_norm_eps"])
1258 |         self.gguf_writer.add_file_type(self.ftype)
1259 | 
1260 |         if self.hparams.get("rope_scaling") is not None and "factor" in self.hparams["rope_scaling"]:
1261 |             if self.hparams["rope_scaling"].get("type") == "linear":
1262 |                 self.gguf_writer.add_rope_scaling_type(gguf.RopeScalingType.LINEAR)
1263 |                 self.gguf_writer.add_rope_scaling_factor(self.hparams["rope_scaling"]["factor"])
1264 | 
1265 |     def modify_tensors(self, data_torch: Tensor, name: str, bid: int | None) -> Iterable[tuple[str, Tensor]]:
1266 |         del bid  # unused
1267 | 
1268 |         head_count = self.hparams["num_attention_heads"]
1269 |         head_count_kv = self.hparams.get("num_key_value_heads", head_count)
1270 | 
1271 |         # HF models permute some of the tensors, so we need to undo that
1272 |         if name.endswith("q_proj.weight"):
1273 |             data_torch = self._reverse_hf_permute(data_torch, head_count, head_count)
1274 |         if name.endswith("k_proj.weight"):
1275 |             data_torch = self._reverse_hf_permute(data_torch, head_count, head_count_kv)
1276 | 
1277 |         return [(self.map_tensor_name(name), data_torch)]
1278 | 
1279 |     def _reverse_hf_permute(self, weights: Tensor, n_head: int, n_kv_head: int | None = None) -> Tensor:
1280 |         if n_kv_head is not None and n_head != n_kv_head:
1281 |             n_head //= n_kv_head
1282 | 
1283 |         return (
1284 |             weights.reshape(n_head, 2, weights.shape[0] // n_head // 2, *weights.shape[1:])
1285 |             .swapaxes(1, 2)
1286 |             .reshape(weights.shape)
1287 |         )
1288 | 
1289 | 
1290 | @Model.register("FalconForCausalLM", "RWForCausalLM")
1291 | class FalconModel(Model):
1292 |     model_arch = gguf.MODEL_ARCH.FALCON
1293 | 
1294 |     def set_gguf_parameters(self):
1295 |         block_count = self.hparams.get("num_hidden_layers")
1296 |         if block_count is None:
1297 |             block_count = self.hparams["n_layer"]  # old name
1298 | 
1299 |         n_head = self.hparams.get("num_attention_heads")
1300 |         if n_head is None:
1301 |             n_head = self.hparams["n_head"]  # old name
1302 | 
1303 |         n_head_kv = self.hparams.get("num_kv_heads")
1304 |         if n_head_kv is None:
1305 |             n_head_kv = self.hparams.get("n_head_kv", 1)  # old name
1306 | 
1307 |         self.gguf_writer.add_context_length(2048)  # not in config.json
1308 |         self.gguf_writer.add_tensor_data_layout("jploski")  # qkv tensor transform
1309 |         self.gguf_writer.add_embedding_length(self.hparams["hidden_size"])
1310 |         self.gguf_writer.add_feed_forward_length(4 * self.hparams["hidden_size"])
1311 |         self.gguf_writer.add_block_count(block_count)
1312 |         self.gguf_writer.add_head_count(n_head)
1313 |         self.gguf_writer.add_head_count_kv(n_head_kv)
1314 |         self.gguf_writer.add_layer_norm_eps(self.hparams["layer_norm_epsilon"])
1315 |         self.gguf_writer.add_file_type(self.ftype)
1316 | 
1317 |     def modify_tensors(self, data_torch: Tensor, name: str, bid: int | None) -> Iterable[tuple[str, Tensor]]:
1318 |         del bid  # unused
1319 | 
1320 |         # QKV tensor transform
1321 |         # The original query_key_value tensor contains n_head_kv "kv groups",
1322 |         # each consisting of n_head/n_head_kv query weights followed by one key
1323 |         # and one value weight (shared by all query heads in the kv group).
1324 |         # This layout makes it a big pain to work with in GGML.
1325 |         # So we rearrange them here,, so that we have n_head query weights
1326 |         # followed by n_head_kv key weights followed by n_head_kv value weights,
1327 |         # in contiguous fashion.
1328 |         # ref: https://github.com/jploski/ggml/blob/falcon40b/examples/falcon/convert-hf-to-ggml.py
1329 | 
1330 |         if "query_key_value" in name:
1331 |             n_head = self.find_hparam(["num_attention_heads", "n_head"])
1332 |             n_head_kv = self.find_hparam(["num_kv_heads", "n_head_kv"], optional=True) or 1
1333 |             head_dim = self.hparams["hidden_size"] // n_head
1334 | 
1335 |             qkv = data_torch.view(n_head_kv, n_head // n_head_kv + 2, head_dim, head_dim * n_head)
1336 |             q = qkv[:, :-2].reshape(n_head * head_dim, head_dim * n_head)
1337 |             k = qkv[:, [-2]].reshape(n_head_kv * head_dim, head_dim * n_head)
1338 |             v = qkv[:, [-1]].reshape(n_head_kv * head_dim, head_dim * n_head)
1339 |             data_torch = torch.cat((q, k, v)).reshape_as(data_torch)
1340 | 
1341 |         return [(self.map_tensor_name(name), data_torch)]
1342 | 
1343 | 
1344 | @Model.register("GPTBigCodeForCausalLM")
1345 | class StarCoderModel(Model):
1346 |     model_arch = gguf.MODEL_ARCH.STARCODER
1347 | 
1348 |     def set_gguf_parameters(self):
1349 |         block_count = self.hparams["n_layer"]
1350 | 
1351 |         self.gguf_writer.add_context_length(self.hparams["n_positions"])
1352 |         self.gguf_writer.add_embedding_length(self.hparams["n_embd"])
1353 |         self.gguf_writer.add_feed_forward_length(4 * self.hparams["n_embd"])
1354 |         self.gguf_writer.add_block_count(block_count)
1355 |         self.gguf_writer.add_head_count(self.hparams["n_head"])
1356 |         self.gguf_writer.add_head_count_kv(1)
1357 |         self.gguf_writer.add_layer_norm_eps(self.hparams["layer_norm_epsilon"])
1358 |         self.gguf_writer.add_file_type(self.ftype)
1359 | 
1360 | 
1361 | @Model.register("GPTRefactForCausalLM")
1362 | class RefactModel(Model):
1363 |     model_arch = gguf.MODEL_ARCH.REFACT
1364 | 
1365 |     def set_vocab(self):
1366 |         super().set_vocab()
1367 | 
1368 |         # TODO: how to determine special FIM tokens automatically?
1369 |         special_vocab = gguf.SpecialVocab(self.dir_model, load_merges=False,
1370 |                                           special_token_types = ['prefix', 'suffix', 'middle', 'eot'])
1371 |         special_vocab._set_special_token("prefix", 1)
1372 |         special_vocab._set_special_token("suffix", 3)
1373 |         special_vocab._set_special_token("middle", 2)
1374 |         special_vocab.chat_template = None  # do not add it twice
1375 |         special_vocab.add_to_gguf(self.gguf_writer)
1376 | 
1377 |     def set_gguf_parameters(self):
1378 |         hidden_dim = self.hparams["n_embd"]
1379 |         inner_dim = 4 * hidden_dim
1380 |         hidden_dim = int(2 * inner_dim / 3)
1381 |         multiple_of = 256
1382 |         ff_dim = multiple_of * ((hidden_dim + multiple_of - 1) // multiple_of)
1383 | 
1384 |         block_count = self.hparams["n_layer"]
1385 | 
1386 |         # refact uses Alibi. So this is from config.json which might be used by training.
1387 |         self.gguf_writer.add_context_length(self.hparams["n_positions"])
1388 |         self.gguf_writer.add_embedding_length(self.hparams["n_embd"])
1389 | 
1390 |         self.gguf_writer.add_feed_forward_length(ff_dim)
1391 |         self.gguf_writer.add_block_count(block_count)
1392 |         self.gguf_writer.add_head_count(self.hparams["n_head"])
1393 |         self.gguf_writer.add_head_count_kv(1)
1394 |         self.gguf_writer.add_layer_norm_rms_eps(self.hparams["layer_norm_epsilon"])
1395 |         self.gguf_writer.add_file_type(self.ftype)
1396 | 
1397 |     def modify_tensors(self, data_torch: Tensor, name: str, bid: int | None) -> Iterable[tuple[str, Tensor]]:
1398 |         hidden_dim = self.hparams["n_embd"]
1399 |         inner_dim = 4 * hidden_dim
1400 |         hidden_dim = int(2 * inner_dim / 3)
1401 |         multiple_of = 256
1402 |         ff_dim = multiple_of * ((hidden_dim + multiple_of - 1) // multiple_of)
1403 |         n_head = self.hparams["n_head"]
1404 |         n_head_kv = 1
1405 |         head_dim = self.hparams["n_embd"] // n_head
1406 | 
1407 |         tensors: list[tuple[str, Tensor]] = []
1408 | 
1409 |         if bid is not None:
1410 |             if name == f"transformer.h.{bid}.attn.kv.weight":
1411 |                 tensors.append((self.format_tensor_name(gguf.MODEL_TENSOR.ATTN_K, bid), data_torch[:n_head_kv * head_dim]))
1412 |                 tensors.append((self.format_tensor_name(gguf.MODEL_TENSOR.ATTN_V, bid), data_torch[n_head_kv * head_dim:]))
1413 |             elif name == f"transformer.h.{bid}.attn.q.weight":
1414 |                 tensors.append((self.format_tensor_name(gguf.MODEL_TENSOR.ATTN_Q, bid), data_torch))
1415 |             elif name == f"transformer.h.{bid}.mlp.gate_up_proj.weight":
1416 |                 tensors.append((self.format_tensor_name(gguf.MODEL_TENSOR.FFN_GATE, bid), data_torch[:ff_dim]))
1417 |                 tensors.append((self.format_tensor_name(gguf.MODEL_TENSOR.FFN_UP, bid), data_torch[ff_dim:]))
1418 | 
1419 |         if len(tensors) == 0:
1420 |             tensors.append((self.map_tensor_name(name), data_torch))
1421 | 
1422 |         return tensors
1423 | 
1424 | 
1425 | @Model.register("StableLmForCausalLM", "StableLMEpochForCausalLM", "LlavaStableLMEpochForCausalLM")
1426 | class StableLMModel(Model):
1427 |     model_arch = gguf.MODEL_ARCH.STABLELM
1428 | 
1429 |     def set_vocab(self):
1430 |         if (self.dir_model / "tokenizer.json").is_file():
1431 |             self._set_vocab_gpt2()
1432 |         else:
1433 |             # StableLM 2 1.6B used to have a vocab in a similar format to Qwen's vocab
1434 |             self._set_vocab_qwen()
1435 | 
1436 |     def set_gguf_parameters(self):
1437 |         hparams = self.hparams
1438 |         block_count = hparams["num_hidden_layers"]
1439 | 
1440 |         self.gguf_writer.add_context_length(hparams["max_position_embeddings"])
1441 |         self.gguf_writer.add_embedding_length(hparams["hidden_size"])
1442 |         self.gguf_writer.add_block_count(block_count)
1443 |         self.gguf_writer.add_feed_forward_length(hparams["intermediate_size"])
1444 |         rotary_factor = self.find_hparam(["partial_rotary_factor", "rope_pct"])
1445 |         self.gguf_writer.add_rope_dimension_count(int(rotary_factor * (hparams["hidden_size"] // hparams["num_attention_heads"])))
1446 |         self.gguf_writer.add_head_count(hparams["num_attention_heads"])
1447 |         self.gguf_writer.add_head_count_kv(hparams["num_key_value_heads"])
1448 |         self.gguf_writer.add_parallel_residual(hparams["use_parallel_residual"] if "use_parallel_residual" in hparams else True)
1449 |         self.gguf_writer.add_layer_norm_eps(self.find_hparam(["layer_norm_eps", "norm_eps"]))
1450 |         self.gguf_writer.add_file_type(self.ftype)
1451 | 
1452 |     _q_norms: list[dict[str, Tensor]] | None = None
1453 |     _k_norms: list[dict[str, Tensor]] | None = None
1454 | 
1455 |     def modify_tensors(self, data_torch: Tensor, name: str, bid: int | None) -> Iterable[tuple[str, Tensor]]:
1456 |         n_head = self.hparams["num_attention_heads"]
1457 |         n_kv_head = self.hparams["num_key_value_heads"]
1458 | 
1459 |         if name.find("q_layernorm.norms") != -1:
1460 |             assert bid is not None
1461 | 
1462 |             if self._q_norms is None:
1463 |                 self._q_norms = [{} for _ in range(self.block_count)]
1464 | 
1465 |             self._q_norms[bid][name] = data_torch
1466 | 
1467 |             if len(self._q_norms[bid]) >= n_head:
1468 |                 return self._stack_qk_norm(bid, n_head, self._q_norms[bid], "q_layernorm")
1469 |             else:
1470 |                 return []
1471 | 
1472 |         if name.find("k_layernorm.norms") != -1:
1473 |             assert bid is not None
1474 | 
1475 |             if self._k_norms is None:
1476 |                 self._k_norms = [{} for _ in range(self.block_count)]
1477 | 
1478 |             self._k_norms[bid][name] = data_torch
1479 | 
1480 |             if len(self._k_norms[bid]) >= n_kv_head:
1481 |                 return self._stack_qk_norm(bid, n_kv_head, self._k_norms[bid], "k_layernorm")
1482 |             else:
1483 |                 return []
1484 | 
1485 |         return [(self.map_tensor_name(name), data_torch)]
1486 | 
1487 |     def _stack_qk_norm(self, bid: int, n_head: int, norms: dict[str, Tensor], layer_name: str = "q_layernorm"):
1488 |         datas: list[Tensor] = []
1489 |         # extract the norms in order
1490 |         for xid in range(n_head):
1491 |             ename = f"model.layers.{bid}.self_attn.{layer_name}.norms.{xid}.weight"
1492 |             datas.append(norms[ename])
1493 |             del norms[ename]
1494 |         data_torch = torch.stack(datas, dim=0)
1495 | 
1496 |         merged_name = f"model.layers.{bid}.self_attn.{layer_name}.weight"
1497 |         new_name = self.map_tensor_name(merged_name)
1498 | 
1499 |         return [(new_name, data_torch)]
1500 | 
1501 |     def prepare_tensors(self):
1502 |         super().prepare_tensors()
1503 | 
1504 |         if self._q_norms is not None or self._k_norms is not None:
1505 |             # flatten two `list[dict[str, Tensor]]` into a single `list[str]`
1506 |             norms = (
1507 |                 [k for d in self._q_norms for k in d.keys()] if self._q_norms is not None else []
1508 |             ) + (
1509 |                 [k for d in self._k_norms for k in d.keys()] if self._k_norms is not None else []
1510 |             )
1511 |             if len(norms) > 0:
1512 |                 raise ValueError(f"Unprocessed norms: {norms}")
1513 | 
1514 | 
1515 | @Model.register("LLaMAForCausalLM", "LlamaForCausalLM", "MistralForCausalLM", "MixtralForCausalLM")
1516 | class LlamaModel(Model):
1517 |     model_arch = gguf.MODEL_ARCH.LLAMA
1518 | 
1519 |     def set_vocab(self):
1520 |         try:
1521 |             self._set_vocab_sentencepiece()
1522 |         except FileNotFoundError:
1523 |             try:
1524 |                 self._set_vocab_llama_hf()
1525 |             except (FileNotFoundError, TypeError):
1526 |                 # Llama 3
1527 |                 self._set_vocab_gpt2()
1528 | 
1529 |         # Apply to CodeLlama only (and ignore for Llama 3 with a vocab size of 128256)
1530 |         if self.hparams.get("vocab_size", 32000) == 32016:
1531 |             special_vocab = gguf.SpecialVocab(
1532 |                 self.dir_model, load_merges=False,
1533 |                 special_token_types = ['prefix', 'suffix', 'middle', 'eot']
1534 |             )
1535 |             special_vocab._set_special_token("prefix", 32007)
1536 |             special_vocab._set_special_token("suffix", 32008)
1537 |             special_vocab._set_special_token("middle", 32009)
1538 |             special_vocab._set_special_token("eot",    32010)
1539 |             special_vocab.add_to_gguf(self.gguf_writer)
1540 | 
1541 |     def set_gguf_parameters(self):
1542 |         super().set_gguf_parameters()
1543 |         hparams = self.hparams
1544 |         self.gguf_writer.add_vocab_size(hparams["vocab_size"])
1545 | 
1546 |         if "head_dim" in hparams:
1547 |             rope_dim = hparams["head_dim"]
1548 |         else:
1549 |             rope_dim = hparams["hidden_size"] // hparams["num_attention_heads"]
1550 |         self.gguf_writer.add_rope_dimension_count(rope_dim)
1551 | 
1552 |         if self.hparams.get("rope_scaling") is not None and "factor" in self.hparams["rope_scaling"]:
1553 |             if self.hparams["rope_scaling"].get("type") == "linear":
1554 |                 self.gguf_writer.add_rope_scaling_type(gguf.RopeScalingType.LINEAR)
1555 |                 self.gguf_writer.add_rope_scaling_factor(self.hparams["rope_scaling"]["factor"])
1556 | 
1557 |         tokenizer_config_file = self.dir_model / 'tokenizer_config.json'
1558 |         if tokenizer_config_file.is_file():
1559 |             with open(tokenizer_config_file, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
1560 |                 tokenizer_config_json = json.load(f)
1561 |                 if "add_prefix_space" in tokenizer_config_json:
1562 |                     self.gguf_writer.add_add_space_prefix(tokenizer_config_json["add_prefix_space"])
1563 | 
1564 |         # Apply to granite small models only
1565 |         if self.hparams.get("vocab_size", 32000) == 49152:
1566 |             self.gguf_writer.add_add_bos_token(False)
1567 | 
1568 |     @staticmethod
1569 |     def permute(weights: Tensor, n_head: int, n_head_kv: int | None):
1570 |         if n_head_kv is not None and n_head != n_head_kv:
1571 |             n_head = n_head_kv
1572 |         return (weights.reshape(n_head, 2, weights.shape[0] // n_head // 2, *weights.shape[1:])
1573 |                 .swapaxes(1, 2)
1574 |                 .reshape(weights.shape))
1575 | 
1576 |     _experts: list[dict[str, Tensor]] | None = None
1577 | 
1578 |     def modify_tensors(self, data_torch: Tensor, name: str, bid: int | None) -> Iterable[tuple[str, Tensor]]:
1579 |         n_head = self.hparams["num_attention_heads"]
1580 |         n_kv_head = self.hparams.get("num_key_value_heads")
1581 | 
1582 |         if name.endswith(("q_proj.weight", "q_proj.bias")):
1583 |             data_torch = LlamaModel.permute(data_torch, n_head, n_head)
1584 |         if name.endswith(("k_proj.weight", "k_proj.bias")):
1585 |             data_torch = LlamaModel.permute(data_torch, n_head, n_kv_head)
1586 | 
1587 |         # process the experts separately
1588 |         if name.find("block_sparse_moe.experts") != -1:
1589 |             n_experts = self.hparams["num_local_experts"]
1590 | 
1591 |             assert bid is not None
1592 | 
1593 |             if self._experts is None:
1594 |                 self._experts = [{} for _ in range(self.block_count)]
1595 | 
1596 |             self._experts[bid][name] = data_torch
1597 | 
1598 |             if len(self._experts[bid]) >= n_experts * 3:
1599 |                 tensors: list[tuple[str, Tensor]] = []
1600 | 
1601 |                 # merge the experts into a single 3d tensor
1602 |                 for wid in ["w1", "w2", "w3"]:
1603 |                     datas: list[Tensor] = []
1604 | 
1605 |                     for xid in range(n_experts):
1606 |                         ename = f"model.layers.{bid}.block_sparse_moe.experts.{xid}.{wid}.weight"
1607 |                         datas.append(self._experts[bid][ename])
1608 |                         del self._experts[bid][ename]
1609 | 
1610 |                     data_torch = torch.stack(datas, dim=0)
1611 | 
1612 |                     merged_name = f"layers.{bid}.feed_forward.experts.{wid}.weight"
1613 | 
1614 |                     new_name = self.map_tensor_name(merged_name)
1615 | 
1616 |                     tensors.append((new_name, data_torch))
1617 |                 return tensors
1618 |             else:
1619 |                 return []
1620 | 
1621 |         return [(self.map_tensor_name(name), data_torch)]
1622 | 
1623 |     def generate_extra_tensors(self) -> Iterable[tuple[str, Tensor]]:
1624 |         if rope_scaling := self.find_hparam(["rope_scaling"], optional=True):
1625 |             if rope_scaling.get("rope_type", '').lower() == "llama3":
1626 |                 base = self.hparams.get("rope_theta", 10000.0)
1627 |                 dim = self.hparams.get("head_dim", self.hparams["hidden_size"] // self.hparams["num_attention_heads"])
1628 |                 freqs = 1.0 / (base ** (torch.arange(0, dim, 2, dtype=torch.float32) / dim))
1629 | 
1630 |                 factor = rope_scaling.get("factor", 8.0)
1631 |                 low_freq_factor = rope_scaling.get("low_freq_factor", 1.0)
1632 |                 high_freq_factor = rope_scaling.get("high_freq_factor", 4.0)
1633 |                 old_context_len = self.hparams.get("original_max_position_embeddings", 8192)
1634 | 
1635 |                 low_freq_wavelen = old_context_len / low_freq_factor
1636 |                 high_freq_wavelen = old_context_len / high_freq_factor
1637 |                 assert low_freq_wavelen != high_freq_wavelen
1638 | 
1639 |                 rope_factors = []
1640 |                 for freq in freqs:
1641 |                     wavelen = 2 * math.pi / freq
1642 |                     if wavelen < high_freq_wavelen:
1643 |                         rope_factors.append(1)
1644 |                     elif wavelen > low_freq_wavelen:
1645 |                         rope_factors.append(factor)
1646 |                     else:
1647 |                         smooth = (old_context_len / wavelen - low_freq_factor) / (high_freq_factor - low_freq_factor)
1648 |                         rope_factors.append(1 / ((1 - smooth) / factor + smooth))
1649 | 
1650 |                 yield (self.format_tensor_name(gguf.MODEL_TENSOR.ROPE_FREQS), torch.tensor(rope_factors, dtype=torch.float32))
1651 | 
1652 |     def prepare_tensors(self):
1653 |         super().prepare_tensors()
1654 | 
1655 |         if self._experts is not None:
1656 |             # flatten `list[dict[str, Tensor]]` into `list[str]`
1657 |             experts = [k for d in self._experts for k in d.keys()]
1658 |             if len(experts) > 0:
1659 |                 raise ValueError(f"Unprocessed experts: {experts}")
1660 | 
1661 | 
1662 | @Model.register("BitnetForCausalLM")
1663 | class BitnetModel(Model):
1664 |     model_arch = gguf.MODEL_ARCH.BITNET
1665 | 
1666 |     def set_vocab(self):
1667 |         self._set_vocab_sentencepiece()
1668 | 
1669 |     def set_gguf_parameters(self):
1670 |         super().set_gguf_parameters()
1671 |         self.gguf_writer.add_rope_scaling_type(gguf.RopeScalingType.LINEAR)
1672 |         self.gguf_writer.add_rope_scaling_factor(1.0)
1673 | 
1674 |     def weight_quant(self, weight: Tensor) -> Tensor:
1675 |         dtype = weight.dtype
1676 |         weight = weight.float()
1677 |         scale = weight.abs().mean().clamp(min=1e-5)
1678 |         iscale = 1 / scale
1679 |         # TODO: multiply by the scale directly instead of inverting it twice
1680 |         # (this is also unnecessarily doubly inverted upstream)
1681 |         # ref: https://huggingface.co/1bitLLM/bitnet_b1_58-3B/blob/af89e318d78a70802061246bf037199d2fb97020/utils_quant.py#L10
1682 |         result = (weight * iscale).round().clamp(-1, 1) / iscale
1683 |         return result.type(dtype)
1684 | 
1685 |     def modify_tensors(self, data_torch: Tensor, name: str, bid: int | None) -> Iterable[tuple[str, Tensor]]:
1686 |         new_name = self.map_tensor_name(name)
1687 | 
1688 |         if any(self.match_model_tensor_name(new_name, key, bid) for key in [
1689 |             gguf.MODEL_TENSOR.ATTN_Q,
1690 |             gguf.MODEL_TENSOR.ATTN_K,
1691 |             gguf.MODEL_TENSOR.ATTN_V,
1692 |             gguf.MODEL_TENSOR.ATTN_OUT,
1693 |             gguf.MODEL_TENSOR.FFN_UP,
1694 |             gguf.MODEL_TENSOR.FFN_DOWN,
1695 |             gguf.MODEL_TENSOR.FFN_GATE,
1696 |         ]):
1697 |             # transform weight into 1/0/-1 (in fp32)
1698 |             data_torch = self.weight_quant(data_torch)
1699 | 
1700 |         yield (new_name, data_torch)
1701 | 
1702 | 
1703 | @Model.register("GrokForCausalLM")
1704 | class GrokModel(Model):
1705 |     model_arch = gguf.MODEL_ARCH.GROK
1706 | 
1707 |     def set_vocab(self):
1708 |         self._set_vocab_sentencepiece()
1709 | 
1710 |     def __init__(self, *args, **kwargs):
1711 |         super().__init__(*args, **kwargs)
1712 | 
1713 |     def set_gguf_parameters(self):
1714 |         super().set_gguf_parameters()
1715 | 
1716 |     _experts: list[dict[str, Tensor]] | None = None
1717 | 
1718 |     def modify_tensors(self, data_torch: Tensor, name: str, bid: int | None) -> Iterable[tuple[str, Tensor]]:
1719 |         # process the experts separately
1720 |         if name.find(".moe.") != -1:
1721 |             n_experts = self.hparams["num_local_experts"]
1722 | 
1723 |             assert bid is not None
1724 | 
1725 |             if self._experts is None:
1726 |                 self._experts = [{} for _ in range(self.block_count)]
1727 | 
1728 |             self._experts[bid][name] = data_torch
1729 | 
1730 |             if len(self._experts[bid]) >= n_experts * 3:
1731 |                 tensors: list[tuple[str, Tensor]] = []
1732 | 
1733 |                 # merge the experts into a single 3d tensor
1734 |                 for wid in ["linear", "linear_1", "linear_v"]:
1735 |                     datas: list[Tensor] = []
1736 | 
1737 |                     for xid in range(n_experts):
1738 |                         ename = f"transformer.decoder_layer.{bid}.moe.{xid}.{wid}.weight"
1739 |                         datas.append(self._experts[bid][ename])
1740 |                         del self._experts[bid][ename]
1741 | 
1742 |                     data_torch = torch.stack(datas, dim=0)
1743 | 
1744 |                     merged_name = f"transformer.decoder_layer.{bid}.moe.{wid}.weight"
1745 | 
1746 |                     new_name = self.map_tensor_name(merged_name)
1747 | 
1748 |                     tensors.append((new_name, data_torch))
1749 |                 return tensors
1750 |             else:
1751 |                 return []
1752 | 
1753 |         return [(self.map_tensor_name(name), data_torch)]
1754 | 
1755 | 
1756 | @Model.register("DbrxForCausalLM")
1757 | class DbrxModel(Model):
1758 |     model_arch = gguf.MODEL_ARCH.DBRX
1759 | 
1760 |     def set_gguf_parameters(self):
1761 |         ffn_config = self.hparams["ffn_config"]
1762 |         attn_config = self.hparams["attn_config"]
1763 |         self.gguf_writer.add_block_count(self.hparams["n_layers"])
1764 | 
1765 |         self.gguf_writer.add_context_length(self.hparams["max_seq_len"])
1766 |         self.gguf_writer.add_embedding_length(self.hparams["d_model"])
1767 |         self.gguf_writer.add_feed_forward_length(ffn_config["ffn_hidden_size"])
1768 | 
1769 |         self.gguf_writer.add_head_count(self.hparams["n_heads"])
1770 |         self.gguf_writer.add_head_count_kv(attn_config["kv_n_heads"])
1771 | 
1772 |         self.gguf_writer.add_rope_freq_base(attn_config["rope_theta"])
1773 | 
1774 |         self.gguf_writer.add_clamp_kqv(attn_config["clip_qkv"])
1775 | 
1776 |         self.gguf_writer.add_expert_count(ffn_config["moe_num_experts"])
1777 |         self.gguf_writer.add_expert_used_count(ffn_config["moe_top_k"])
1778 | 
1779 |         self.gguf_writer.add_layer_norm_eps(1e-5)
1780 | 
1781 |         self.gguf_writer.add_file_type(self.ftype)
1782 |         logger.info(f"gguf: file type = {self.ftype}")
1783 | 
1784 |     def modify_tensors(self, data_torch: Tensor, name: str, bid: int | None) -> Iterable[tuple[str, Tensor]]:
1785 |         del bid  # unused
1786 | 
1787 |         n_expert = self.hparams["ffn_config"]["moe_num_experts"]
1788 |         n_ff = self.hparams["ffn_config"]["ffn_hidden_size"]
1789 |         n_embd = self.hparams["d_model"]
1790 | 
1791 |         # Specific behavior for experts tensors: suffix .weight, view as 3D and transpose
1792 |         # original implementation expects (n_expert, n_ff, n_embd) for all experts weights
1793 |         # But llama.cpp moe graph works differently
1794 |         # AND the dimensions in ggml are typically in the reverse order of the pytorch dimensions
1795 |         # so (n_expert, n_ff, n_embd) in pytorch is {n_embd, n_ff, n_expert} in ggml_tensor
1796 |         exp_tensor_names = {"ffn.experts.mlp.w1": None,       # LLM_TENSOR_FFN_GATE_EXPS ggml_tensor->ne{n_embd, n_ff,   n_expert}
1797 |                             "ffn.experts.mlp.w2": (0, 2, 1),  # LLM_TENSOR_FFN_DOWN_EXPS ggml_tensor->ne{n_ff,   n_embd, n_expert}
1798 |                             "ffn.experts.mlp.v1": None}       # LLM_TENSOR_FFN_UP_EXPS   ggml_tensor->ne{n_embd, n_ff,   n_expert}
1799 |         experts = False
1800 | 
1801 |         for exp_tensor_name in exp_tensor_names.keys():
1802 |             if name.find(exp_tensor_name) != -1 and name.find(".weight") == -1:
1803 |                 experts = True
1804 |                 data_torch = data_torch.view(n_expert, n_ff, n_embd)
1805 |                 if (permute_tensor := exp_tensor_names[exp_tensor_name]) is not None:
1806 |                     data_torch = data_torch.permute(*permute_tensor)
1807 |                 break
1808 | 
1809 |         # map tensor names
1810 |         # In MoE models the ffn tensors are typically most of the model weights,
1811 |         # and need to be quantizable. Quantize expects tensor names to be suffixed by .weight.
1812 |         # Every other model has the weight names ending in .weight,
1813 |         # let's assume that is the convention which is not the case for dbrx:
1814 |         # https://huggingface.co/databricks/dbrx-instruct/blob/main/model.safetensors.index.json#L15
1815 |         new_name = self.map_tensor_name(name if not experts else name + ".weight", try_suffixes=(".weight",))
1816 | 
1817 |         return [(new_name, data_torch)]
1818 | 
1819 |     def tensor_force_quant(self, name: str, new_name: str, bid: int | None, n_dims: int) -> gguf.GGMLQuantizationType | bool:
1820 |         del name, new_name, bid  # unused
1821 | 
1822 |         return n_dims > 1
1823 | 
1824 | 
1825 | @Model.register("MiniCPMForCausalLM")
1826 | class MiniCPMModel(Model):
1827 |     model_arch = gguf.MODEL_ARCH.MINICPM
1828 | 
1829 |     def set_gguf_parameters(self):
1830 |         block_count = self.hparams["num_hidden_layers"]
1831 |         self.gguf_writer.add_context_length(self.hparams["max_position_embeddings"])
1832 |         self.gguf_writer.add_embedding_length(self.hparams["hidden_size"])
1833 |         self.gguf_writer.add_block_count(block_count)
1834 |         self.gguf_writer.add_feed_forward_length(self.hparams["intermediate_size"])
1835 |         self.gguf_writer.add_rope_dimension_count(self.hparams["hidden_size"] // self.hparams["num_attention_heads"])
1836 |         self.gguf_writer.add_head_count(self.hparams["num_attention_heads"])
1837 |         self.gguf_writer.add_head_count_kv(self.hparams["num_key_value_heads"])
1838 |         self.gguf_writer.add_layer_norm_rms_eps(self.hparams["rms_norm_eps"])
1839 |         self.gguf_writer.add_file_type(self.ftype)
1840 | 
1841 |     def set_vocab(self):
1842 |         self._set_vocab_llama_hf()
1843 | 
1844 |     def _reverse_hf_permute(self, weights: Tensor, n_head: int, n_kv_head: int | None = None) -> Tensor:
1845 |         if n_kv_head is not None and n_head != n_kv_head:
1846 |             n_head //= n_kv_head
1847 | 
1848 |         return (
1849 |             weights.reshape(n_head, 2, weights.shape[0] // n_head // 2, *weights.shape[1:])
1850 |             .swapaxes(1, 2)
1851 |             .reshape(weights.shape)
1852 |         )
1853 | 
1854 |     def modify_tensors(self, data_torch: Tensor, name: str, bid: int | None) -> Iterable[tuple[str, Tensor]]:
1855 |         del bid  # unused
1856 | 
1857 |         n_head = self.hparams["num_attention_heads"]
1858 |         n_kv_head = self.hparams.get("num_key_value_heads")
1859 | 
1860 |         # HF models permute some of the tensors, so we need to undo that
1861 |         if name.endswith(("q_proj.weight")):
1862 |             data_torch = self._reverse_hf_permute(data_torch, n_head, n_head)
1863 |         if name.endswith(("k_proj.weight")):
1864 |             data_torch = self._reverse_hf_permute(data_torch, n_head, n_kv_head)
1865 | 
1866 |         return [(self.map_tensor_name(name), data_torch)]
1867 | 
1868 | 
1869 | @Model.register("MiniCPM3ForCausalLM")
1870 | class MiniCPM3Model(Model):
1871 |     model_arch = gguf.MODEL_ARCH.MINICPM3
1872 | 
1873 |     def set_gguf_parameters(self):
1874 |         hparams = self.hparams
1875 | 
1876 |         self.gguf_writer.add_file_type(self.ftype)
1877 |         self.gguf_writer.add_context_length(hparams["max_position_embeddings"])
1878 |         self.gguf_writer.add_embedding_length(hparams["hidden_size"])
1879 |         self.gguf_writer.add_block_count(self.block_count)
1880 |         self.gguf_writer.add_feed_forward_length(hparams["intermediate_size"])
1881 |         self.gguf_writer.add_head_count(hparams["num_attention_heads"])
1882 |         self.gguf_writer.add_head_count_kv(hparams["num_key_value_heads"])
1883 |         self.gguf_writer.add_layer_norm_rms_eps(hparams["rms_norm_eps"])
1884 |         self.gguf_writer.add_vocab_size(hparams["vocab_size"])
1885 |         if "q_lora_rank" in hparams and hparams["q_lora_rank"] is not None:
1886 |             self.gguf_writer.add_q_lora_rank(hparams["q_lora_rank"])
1887 |         self.gguf_writer.add_kv_lora_rank(hparams["kv_lora_rank"])
1888 |         self.gguf_writer.add_key_length(hparams["qk_nope_head_dim"] + hparams["qk_rope_head_dim"])
1889 |         self.gguf_writer.add_rope_dimension_count(hparams["qk_rope_head_dim"])
1890 | 
1891 |     def generate_extra_tensors(self) -> Iterable[tuple[str, Tensor]]:
1892 |         rope_scaling = self.find_hparam(['rope_scaling'], True)
1893 |         if rope_scaling is not None:
1894 |             rope_dims = self.hparams["qk_rope_head_dim"]
1895 | 
1896 |             long_factors = rope_scaling.get('long_factor', None)
1897 |             short_factors = rope_scaling.get('short_factor', None)
1898 | 
1899 |             if long_factors is None or short_factors is None:
1900 |                 raise KeyError('Missing the required key rope_scaling.long_factor or rope_scaling_short_factor')
1901 | 
1902 |             if len(long_factors) != len(short_factors) or len(long_factors) != rope_dims / 2:
1903 |                 raise ValueError(f'The length of rope long and short factors must be {rope_dims / 2}')
1904 | 
1905 |             yield (self.format_tensor_name(gguf.MODEL_TENSOR.ROPE_FACTORS_LONG), torch.tensor(long_factors, dtype=torch.float32))
1906 |             yield (self.format_tensor_name(gguf.MODEL_TENSOR.ROPE_FACTORS_SHORT), torch.tensor(short_factors, dtype=torch.float32))
1907 | 
1908 |     def set_vocab(self):
1909 |         self._set_vocab_sentencepiece()
1910 | 
1911 |     def _reverse_hf_permute(self, weights: Tensor, n_head: int, n_kv_head: int | None = None) -> Tensor:
1912 |         if n_kv_head is not None and n_head != n_kv_head:
1913 |             n_head //= n_kv_head
1914 | 
1915 |         return (
1916 |             weights.reshape(n_head, 2, weights.shape[0] // n_head // 2, *weights.shape[1:])
1917 |             .swapaxes(1, 2)
1918 |             .reshape(weights.shape)
1919 |         )
1920 |

1922 | @Model.register("QWenLMHeadModel")
1923 | class QwenModel(Model):
1924 |     model_arch = gguf.MODEL_ARCH.QWEN
1925 | 
1926 |     @staticmethod
1927 |     def token_bytes_to_string(b):
1928 |         from transformers.models.gpt2.tokenization_gpt2 import bytes_to_unicode
1929 |         byte_encoder = bytes_to_unicode()
1930 |         return ''.join([byte_encoder[ord(char)] for char in b.decode('latin-1')])
1931 | 
1932 |     @staticmethod
1933 |     def bpe(mergeable_ranks: dict[bytes, int], token: bytes, max_rank: int | None = None) -> list[bytes]:
1934 |         parts = [bytes([b]) for b in token]
1935 |         while True:
1936 |             min_idx = None
1937 |             min_rank = None
1938 |             for i, pair in enumerate(zip(parts[:-1], parts[1:])):
1939 |                 rank = mergeable_ranks.get(pair[0] + pair[1])
1940 |                 if rank is not None and (min_rank is None or rank < min_rank):
1941 |                     min_idx = i
1942 |                     min_rank = rank
1943 |             if min_rank is None or (max_rank is not None and min_rank >= max_rank):
1944 |                 break
1945 |             assert min_idx is not None
1946 |             parts = parts[:min_idx] + [parts[min_idx] + parts[min_idx + 1]] + parts[min_idx + 2:]
1947 |         return parts
1948 | 
1949 |     def set_vocab(self):
1950 |         self._set_vocab_qwen()
1951 | 
1952 |     def set_gguf_parameters(self):
1953 |         self.gguf_writer.add_context_length(self.hparams["max_position_embeddings"])
1954 |         self.gguf_writer.add_block_count(self.hparams["num_hidden_layers"])
1955 |         self.gguf_writer.add_embedding_length(self.hparams["hidden_size"])
1956 |         self.gguf_writer.add_feed_forward_length(self.hparams["intermediate_size"])
1957 |         self.gguf_writer.add_rope_freq_base(self.hparams["rotary_emb_base"])
1958 |         self.gguf_writer.add_rope_dimension_count(self.hparams["hidden_size"] // self.hparams["num_attention_heads"])
1959 |         self.gguf_writer.add_head_count(self.hparams["num_attention_heads"])
1960 |         self.gguf_writer.add_layer_norm_rms_eps(self.hparams["layer_norm_epsilon"])
1961 |         self.gguf_writer.add_file_type(self.ftype)
1962 | 
1963 |

1975 | @Model.register("Qwen2MoeForCausalLM")
1976 | class Qwen2MoeModel(Model):
1977 |     model_arch = gguf.MODEL_ARCH.QWEN2MOE
1978 | 
1979 |     def set_gguf_parameters(self):
1980 |         super().set_gguf_parameters()
1981 |         if (n_experts := self.hparams.get("num_experts")) is not None:
1982 |             self.gguf_writer.add_expert_count(n_experts)
1983 |         if (moe_intermediate_size := self.hparams.get("moe_intermediate_size")) is not None:
1984 |             self.gguf_writer.add_expert_feed_forward_length(moe_intermediate_size)
1985 |             logger.info(f"gguf: expert feed forward length = {moe_intermediate_size}")
1986 |         if (shared_expert_intermediate_size := self.hparams.get('shared_expert_intermediate_size')) is not None:
1987 |             self.gguf_writer.add_expert_shared_feed_forward_length(shared_expert_intermediate_size)
1988 |             logger.info(f"gguf: expert shared feed forward length = {shared_expert_intermediate_size}")
1989 | 
1990 |     _experts: list[dict[str, Tensor]] | None = None
1991 | 
1992 |     def modify_tensors(self, data_torch: Tensor, name: str, bid: int | None) -> Iterable[tuple[str, Tensor]]:
1993 |         # process the experts separately
1994 |         if name.find("experts") != -1:
1995 |             n_experts = self.hparams["num_experts"]
1996 |             assert bid is not None
1997 | 
1998 |             if self._experts is None:
1999 |                 self._experts = [{} for _ in range(self.block_count)]

[read_file for 'docs/papers/FlexInfer/convert_hf_to_gguf_update.py']
File: docs/papers/FlexInfer/convert_hf_to_gguf_update.py
  1 | #!/usr/bin/env python3
  2 | # -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
  3 | 
  4 | # This script downloads the tokenizer models of the specified models from Huggingface and
  5 | # generates the get_vocab_base_pre() function for convert_hf_to_gguf.py
  6 | #
  7 | # This is necessary in order to analyze the type of pre-tokenizer used by the model and
  8 | # provide the necessary information to llama.cpp via the GGUF header in order to implement
  9 | # the same pre-tokenizer.
 10 | #
 11 | # ref: https://github.com/ggerganov/llama.cpp/pull/6920
 12 | #
 13 | # Instructions:
 14 | #
 15 | # - Add a new model to the "models" list
 16 | # - Run the script with your huggingface token:
 17 | #
 18 | #   python3 convert_hf_to_gguf_update.py <huggingface_token>
 19 | #
 20 | # - Copy-paste the generated get_vocab_base_pre() function into convert_hf_to_gguf.py
 21 | # - Update llama.cpp with the new pre-tokenizer if necessary
 22 | #
 23 | # TODO: generate tokenizer tests for llama.cpp
 24 | #
 25 | 
 26 | import logging
 27 | import os
 28 | import pathlib
 29 | import re
 30 | 
 31 | import requests
 32 | import sys
 33 | import json
 34 | import shutil
 35 | 
 36 | from hashlib import sha256
 37 | from enum import IntEnum, auto
 38 | from transformers import AutoTokenizer
 39 | 
 40 | logging.basicConfig(level=logging.DEBUG)
 41 | logger = logging.getLogger("convert_hf_to_gguf_update")
 42 | sess = requests.Session()
 43 | 
 44 | 
 45 | class TOKENIZER_TYPE(IntEnum):
 46 |     SPM = auto()
 47 |     BPE = auto()
 48 |     WPM = auto()
 49 |     UGM = auto()
 50 | 
 51 | 
 52 | # TODO: this string has to exercise as much pre-tokenizer functionality as possible
 53 | #       will be updated with time - contributions welcome
 54 | CHK_TXT = '\n \n\n \n\n\n \t \t\t \t\n  \n   \n    \n     \n🚀 (normal) 😶‍🌫️ (multiple emojis concatenated) ✅ 🦙🦙 3 33 333 3333 33333 333333 3333333 33333333 3.3 3..3 3...3 កាន់តែពិសេសអាច😁 ?我想在apple工作1314151天～ ------======= нещо на Български \'\'\'\'\'\'```````\"\"\"\"......!!!!!!?????? I\'ve been \'told he\'s there, \'RE you sure? \'M not sure I\'ll make it, \'D you like some tea? We\'Ve a\'lL'
 55 | 
 56 | if len(sys.argv) == 2:
 57 |     token = sys.argv[1]
 58 |     if not token.startswith("hf_"):
 59 |         logger.info("Huggingface token seems invalid")
 60 |         logger.info("Usage: python convert_hf_to_gguf_update.py <huggingface_token>")
 61 |         sys.exit(1)
 62 | else:
 63 |     logger.info("Usage: python convert_hf_to_gguf_update.py <huggingface_token>")
 64 |     sys.exit(1)
 65 | 
 66 | # TODO: add models here, base models preferred
 67 | models = [
 68 |     {"name": "llama-spm",      "tokt": TOKENIZER_TYPE.SPM, "repo": "https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-hf", },
 69 |     {"name": "llama-bpe",      "tokt": TOKENIZER_TYPE.BPE, "repo": "https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B", },
 70 |     {"name": "phi-3",          "tokt": TOKENIZER_TYPE.SPM, "repo": "https://huggingface.co/microsoft/Phi-3-mini-4k-instruct", },
 71 |     {"name": "deepseek-llm",   "tokt": TOKENIZER_TYPE.BPE, "repo": "https://huggingface.co/deepseek-ai/deepseek-llm-7b-base", },
 72 |     {"name": "deepseek-coder", "tokt": TOKENIZER_TYPE.BPE, "repo": "https://huggingface.co/deepseek-ai/deepseek-coder-6.7b-base", },
 73 |     {"name": "falcon",         "tokt": TOKENIZER_TYPE.BPE, "repo": "https://huggingface.co/tiiuae/falcon-7b", },
 74 |     {"name": "bert-bge",       "tokt": TOKENIZER_TYPE.WPM, "repo": "https://huggingface.co/BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5", },
 75 |     {"name": "mpt",            "tokt": TOKENIZER_TYPE.BPE, "repo": "https://huggingface.co/mosaicml/mpt-7b", },
 76 |     {"name": "starcoder",      "tokt": TOKENIZER_TYPE.BPE, "repo": "https://huggingface.co/bigcode/starcoder2-3b", },
 77 |     {"name": "gpt-2",          "tokt": TOKENIZER_TYPE.BPE, "repo": "https://huggingface.co/openai-community/gpt2", },
 78 |     {"name": "stablelm2",      "tokt": TOKENIZER_TYPE.BPE, "repo": "https://huggingface.co/stabilityai/stablelm-2-zephyr-1_6b", },
 79 |     {"name": "refact",         "tokt": TOKENIZER_TYPE.BPE, "repo": "https://huggingface.co/smallcloudai/Refact-1_6-base", },
